kata — keybindings

Global                                 List                       Detail                                 
?         help                         k/up    up                 tab            next tab                
q/ctrl+c  quit                         j/down  down               shift+tab      prev tab                
R         toggle project / all-projectspgup    page up            enter          jump to referenced issue
                                       pgdown  page down          esc/backspace  back                    
                                       g       first              e              edit body               
                                       G       last               c              new comment             
                                       enter   open detail        p              set parent              
                                       n       new issue          b              add blocker             
                                       /       search             L              add link                
                                       s       cycle status filter+              add label               
                                       o       filter by owner    -              remove label            
                                       l       filter by label    a              assign owner            
                                       c       clear filters      A              clear owner             
                                       x       close                                                     
                                       r       reopen                                                    

press ? to return
